datasets.name: inventory_dataset
datasets.query: SELECT market_key, terminal_id, product_id, inventory_health, inventory_units_avg, demand_units_avg, inventory_utilization_ratio FROM reggie_pierce.racetrac_gismo.gold_inventory_visibility ORDER BY inventory_utilization_ratio DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: forecast_dataset
datasets.query: SELECT market_key, product_id, ai_forecast_units, forecast_confidence, forecast_lower_bound, forecast_upper_bound FROM reggie_pierce.racetrac_gismo.gold_demand_forecast ORDER BY ai_forecast_units DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: decisions_dataset
datasets.query: SELECT ai_query_action, ai_query_reason_code, COUNT(*) AS decision_count FROM reggie_pierce.racetrac_gismo.gold_ai_query_decisions GROUP BY ai_query_action, ai_query_reason_code ORDER BY decision_count DESC

datasets.name: dispatch_dataset
datasets.query: SELECT market_key, route_id, dispatch_risk_level, route_cost_exposure, freight_cost_avg, telematics_risk_avg FROM reggie_pierce.racetrac_gismo.gold_dispatch_exposure ORDER BY route_cost_exposure DESC LIMIT 200
